message:
Fix float formatting, math NULL semantics, and VDBE engine improvements

- builtins.rs: Use format_sqlite_float() in QuoteFunc instead of
  manual decimal-point logic
- math.rs: Trim whitespace before parsing text to f64 (matching
  sqlite3AtoF), return None for non-numeric text
- value.rs: Add format_sqlite_float() function and related float
  formatting improvements
- engine.rs: VDBE engine opcode handling fixes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
